title: 'Islamabad Declaration' — Geneva likely signing venue; C-17s departed; Vance & Qalibaf signatories
snippet: The deal is formally called the 'Islamabad Declaration' acknowledging Pakistan's mediation role. Geneva is the likeliest venue for the signing ceremony. 4 US Air Force C-17 planes departed to Europe carrying equipment for possible VP Vance travel. Vance and Iran Parliament Speaker Qalibaf expected as signatories. Location is near Trump's G7 attendance in France next week.
tag_reason: '이슬라마바드 선언' 공식 명칭, 제네바 장소, C-17 출발, 칼리바프 서명자 — 모두 신규 정보
